creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-02-16 23:08:12 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-SVN-Access  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  SVN::Access includes both an object oriented interface for manipulating
  SVN access files (AuthzSVNAccessFile files), as well as a command
  line interface to that object oriented programming interface
  (svnaclmgr.pl) which is in the examples/ directory.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/SVN-Access/
  
  PR:             ports/120555
  Submitted by:   Greg Larkin <glarkin at sourcehosting.net>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2994    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +36 -0     ports/devel/p5-SVN-Access/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-SVN-Access/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-SVN-Access/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +10 -0     ports/devel/p5-SVN-Access/pkg-plist (new)
